languages.text: {n}Вокс-канал заполняет напряженная тишина. За ней звучит короткий щелчок — связь обрывается.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вокс-канал заполняет напряженная тишина. За ней звучит короткий щелчок — связь обрывается.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tense silence fills the vox-channel. It is followed by a short click — the connection was ended.{/n}

languages.text: {n}音阵频道里弥漫着令人不安的沉默。随后传来短促的咔哒声，通讯被中断了。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tense silence fills the vox-channel. It is followed by a short click — the connection was ended.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}音阵频道里弥漫着令人不安的沉默。随后传来短促的咔哒声，通讯被中断了。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un silence tendu retombe sur le canal-vox, puis un petit clic vous indique que la connexion a été coupée.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tense silence fills the vox-channel. It is followed by a short click — the connection was ended.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un silence tendu retombe sur le canal-vox, puis un petit clic vous indique que la connexion a été coupée.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Voks kanalını gergin bir sessizlik kaplıyor. Ardından kısa bir tıklama geliyor. Bağlantı kesiliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tense silence fills the vox-channel. It is followed by a short click — the connection was ended.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Voks kanalını gergin bir sessizlik kaplıyor. Ardından kısa bir tıklama geliyor. Bağlantı kesiliyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un tenso silencio llena el canal de voco. Poco después oyes un breve clic: la conexión ha terminado.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tense silence fills the vox-channel. It is followed by a short click — the connection was ended.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un tenso silencio llena el canal de voco. Poco después oyes un breve clic: la conexión ha terminado.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine angespannte Stille erfüllt den Voxkanal. Es folgt ein kurzes Klicken, als die Verbindung getrennt wird.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Tense silence fills the vox-channel. It is followed by a short click — the connection was ended.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eine angespannte Stille erfüllt den Voxkanal. Es folgt ein kurzes Klicken, als die Verbindung getrennt wird.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ボイスチャネルに緊張した沈黙が訪れる。そして、短いクリック音が響く。接続が切れたのだ。{/n}
